response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development, proficiency in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and Node.js, and a strong background in software craftsmanship and testing.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the role
Strong experience in full-stack development and software craftsmanship
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and React in the primary stack
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java in the context of the primary job requirements
Some experience is in different industries and not directly related to internal automation tooling
